subcodes.first_line: O ye wayfarers in the path of guidance! Praise be to God that the convoy of His grace hath arrived, and the light of guidance hath shone forth, dispelling the darkness of error [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سالکان سبیل هدی حمد خدا را که بدرقه عنایت رسید نور هدایت درخشید ظلمت ضلالت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
